Name: Merlin-1a
Text: If this craft returns to Earth, return this card to hand.
DESCRIPTION: Stylized close-up of a reusable rocket engine firing with blue-orange exhaust, cartoon Kerbal-inspired, clean vector, studio lighting

Name: Sterling Booster
Text: High reliability, single-use. Always available for purchase.
DESCRIPTION: Solid rocket booster with robust casing, sparks and plume, playful cartoon style, crisp lines

Name: Hydrogen Core
Text: Requires at least one Cryo Tank. High thrust.
DESCRIPTION: High-performance liquid hydrogen engine with cryo piping and frost, cinematic lighting, stylized realism

Name: Ion Sustainer
Text: Low thrust but very reliable and efficient.
DESCRIPTION: Ion thruster glowing blue in vacuum, subtle exhaust rays, minimalist Kerbal-esque style

Name: Hybrid Cycle
Text: If this craft returns to Earth, return this card to hand.
DESCRIPTION: A hybrid rocket engine with balanced plume, clean engineering cutaway, friendly cartoon aesthetic

Name: Raptor-X
Text: High risk, high reward. May cause major failure on roll.
DESCRIPTION: Futuristic heavy-lift engine with dramatic flame and heat glow, bold heroic style, high contrast

Name: Kick Stage
Text: Stage: +2 Range for this launch. Still counts as your Engine for this mission. Discard after launch.
Flavor: A booster you drop once it has done its job.
DESCRIPTION: Compact booster stage separating cleanly after burnout, playful educational illustration with clear stage rings

Name: Standard Tank
Text: Compatible with most engines. Always available for purchase.
DESCRIPTION: Cylindrical fuel tank with service panels, simple industrial look, soft shadows, cartoon-friendly

Name: Cryo Tank
Text: Required for Hydrogen Core engine.
DESCRIPTION: Insulated cryogenic propellant tank with frost and insulation straps, cool tones, stylized technical art

Name: Fuel Pod
Text: Stage: +1 Range for this launch. Discard after launch.
DESCRIPTION: Small drop-off fuel pod with jettison straps, compact design, playful vector illustration

Name: Expandable Tank
Text: Stage: +2 Range for this launch. Discard after launch.
DESCRIPTION: Expandable fuel bladder tank mid-deployment, foldable panels, clean whimsical style

Name: Pressurized Tank
Text: Safer for crewed payloads.
DESCRIPTION: Pressurized crew tank with markings and safety decals, warm colors, approachable illustration

Name: Long-Range Tank
Text: Range 12. Heavy. Mass 4.
DESCRIPTION: Large extended-range propellant tank with reinforcement ribs, rugged look, dramatic lighting

Name: Comm Satellite
Text: Spend 1 Energy to activate this satellite's communications systems. Grants mission VP when delivering to LEO or GEO. Remains on the board as an on-orbit asset.
DESCRIPTION: A compact communications satellite with dish and solar panels, orbit backdrop, crisp stylized art

Name: Imaging Probe
Text: Spend 1 Energy to activate this probe's imaging systems. Good for Earth/Moon recon missions.
DESCRIPTION: Small imaging probe with camera aperture and solar wings, high-detail cartoon, studio lighting

Name: Science Module
Text: Spend 2 Energy to activate this module's instruments. High reward for deep-space research missions.
DESCRIPTION: Modular science module with instruments and antennae, intricate components, friendly realistic style

Name: Crew Capsule
Text: Spend 1 Energy when this capsule launches or relaunches from a surface. Enables crewed missions. If this craft returns to Earth, return this card to hand.
DESCRIPTION: Crew capsule with windows and heatshield, small crew silhouettes, warm inviting illustration

Name: CubeSat Cluster
Text: Cheap, small experiments. Remains on the board as an on-orbit asset.
DESCRIPTION: Cluster of colorful CubeSats deployed in orbit, playful miniature design, vector art

Name: Landing Lander
Text: Enables surface landing. Alternative: use Rocket-as-Lander (Engine + sufficient Range).
DESCRIPTION: Compact lunar lander with legs and dust plume, heroic angle, stylized but detailed

Name: Cargo Return Capsule
Text: Useful for recovery or sample-return missions. If this craft returns to Earth, return this card to hand.
DESCRIPTION: Compact blunt-body cargo capsule descending toward a runway with service markings, bright educational cartoon style
ImageDescription: Reusable cargo return capsule reentering Earth's atmosphere, blunt-body spacecraft with glowing heat shield, visible service markings, educational sci-fi illustration, crisp silhouette, warm cinematic lighting

Name: Heat Shield
Text: Landing support. Use from a Sub-Orbital node to land safely. Discard after use. Always available for purchase.
DESCRIPTION: Protective ablative heat shield tile glowing during atmospheric entry, bright educational style

Name: Recovery Chutes
Text: Landing support. Use from a Sub-Orbital node to land safely. Discard after use.
DESCRIPTION: Recovery parachutes deploying above a capsule, clear playful illustration with bright fabric canopies

Name: Ceramic Tile Shield
Text: Landing support. Use from a Sub-Orbital node to land safely. If this craft returns to Earth, return this card to hand.
Flavor: A tougher shield for repeat flights.
DESCRIPTION: Reusable ceramic heat shield tiles on a lifting capsule during glowing reentry, clean technical cartoon art
ImageDescription: Close view of reusable ceramic heat shield tiles glowing during atmospheric reentry, clean aerospace surface details, educational technical illustration, bright orange plasma and readable shape

Name: Guided Parafoil
Text: Landing support. Use from a Sub-Orbital node to land safely. If this craft returns to Earth, return this card to hand.
Flavor: Steer it back for another launch.
DESCRIPTION: Guided parafoil carrying a small capsule toward a marked landing strip, colorful precise illustration
ImageDescription: Small return capsule descending beneath a guided parafoil toward a desert runway, colorful canopy, clear readable composition, playful aerospace illustration, bright daylight

Name: LEO Deployment
Text:
Reach LEO.
Carry an Uncrewed payload.
DESCRIPTION: A satellite deploying into low Earth orbit above Earth, colorful orbital scene, cinematic cartoon style
ImageDescription: Uncrewed satellite deployment in low Earth orbit above the blue curve of Earth, solar panels unfolding, optimistic space program poster style, bright cinematic lighting

Name: Lunar Flyby
Text:
Reach Moon Orbit and return to Earth.
Total route range needed: 10.
DESCRIPTION: Spacecraft arcing past the Moon with Earth in background, dramatic lighting, stylized art

Name: Lunar Landing
Text:
Reach the Moon surface (one-way).
Have Landing Lander or Rocket-as-Lander.
DESCRIPTION: Lander descending to lunar surface with dust and horizon, heroic, warm tones, stylized realism

Name: Mars Orbit Insertion
Text:
Reach Mars High Orbit.
Add Transfer Window cost to route plan.
Carry payload Mass 2+.
DESCRIPTION: Spacecraft performing orbital insertion around Mars with red planet backdrop, cinematic stylized art

Name: Deep Space Probe
Text:
Reach Sub-Orbital Mars.
Add Transfer Window cost to route plan.
Have Scientific payload + Sensor Array.
Spend 2 Energy for mission ops.
DESCRIPTION: Lonely deep-space probe against starfield, subtle glow, evocative minimalist sci-fi illustration

Name: Crewed Station Visit
Text:
Reach Earth ZOI and return to Earth.
Have Crewed Capsule + Docking card + Engine.
DESCRIPTION: Crew capsule approaching an orbital station with docking port, friendly human-scale scene, warm lighting

Name: Emergency Resupply
Text:
Reach LEO and return to Earth.
Carry payload Mass 2+.
DESCRIPTION: Cargo ship making an urgent resupply approach to orbital depot, dynamic scene, cartoon style

Name: Science Relay
Text:
Reach High Orbit and return to Earth.
Have Scientific or Comm payload.
Spend 1 Energy to run relay instruments.
DESCRIPTION: Network of satellites relaying data between Earth and a distant probe, schematic yet cinematic, stylized art

Name: Orbital Service Check
Text:
From LEO, reach High Orbit, then return to LEO.
Have On-Orbit Satellite + Engine with remaining Range.
DESCRIPTION: Small service craft inspecting an orbiting satellite against Earth backdrop, playful technical illustration

Name: Capsule Recovery
Text:
From Sub-Orbital Earth, land at Earth.
Carry payload Mass 1 + Heat Shield or Parachute.
DESCRIPTION: Capsule descending under parachutes toward a landing zone, friendly clear visual storytelling

Name: Reusable Flight Test
Text:
Fly Earth → Sub-Orbital Earth → Earth.
Use Reusable Payload + Reusable reentry support.
DESCRIPTION: Reusable capsule and recovery gear completing a clean test return over a desert landing site, bright aerospace illustration

Name: Lunar Sample Return
Text:
Reach Moon surface, collect samples, and return to Earth.
Have Lander (or Rocket-as-Lander) + Cargo Return Capsule + Earth reentry support.
DESCRIPTION: A small return capsule blazing toward Earth with lunar samples secured inside, dramatic return arc, stylized illustration
ImageDescription: Lunar sample return capsule racing back toward Earth from deep space, glowing reentry trail, moon in the distance, heroic educational sci-fi illustration, strong readable silhouette

Name: Reusable Refurb
Text: Your Reusable engines gain +1 Reliability. When you recover a Reusable card during Maintenance, gain 1 Credit.
DESCRIPTION: Workshop scene with engineers refurbishing an engine, warm light, characterful illustration

Name: Cryo Handling
Text: Your rockets that include a Cryo Tank gain +1 Reliability on launch checks.
DESCRIPTION: Technician inspecting cryogenic systems with frosty details, cool palette, stylized technical art

Name: Precision Guidance
Text: Increase mission success chance: +1 effective reliability on launch checks.
DESCRIPTION: Navigation console with trajectory plots and a glowing guidance chip, sleek futuristic UI, stylized

Name: Modular Payloads
Text: Reduce your payload's Mass by 1 (minimum 1) for Thrust checks.
DESCRIPTION: Modular payload racks being swapped by technicians, clean diagrammatic style, approachable art

Name: Solar Storm
Text: Global: All launches this round suffer -2 reliability.
DESCRIPTION: Dramatic solar storm with charged particles and aurora over spacecraft, vibrant colors, stylized scene

Name: Funding Boost
Text: Occasional bonus: All players gain +3 Credits immediately.
DESCRIPTION: Celebratory scene with rocket and coins/confetti, bright cheerful style, playful illustration

Name: Supply Delay
Text: Players must spend +1 Credit to prepare launches this round.
DESCRIPTION: Crates and containers delayed in a busy spaceport, muted tones, light-hearted stylized art

Name: Tech Breakthrough
Text: First player to launch this round searches the Component Deck for 1 Technology card (add to hand, reshuffle).
DESCRIPTION: Scientist holding a glowing microchip in a lab, sparkles and light, optimistic stylized illustration

Name: Docking Adapter
Text: Enables docking with stations and other craft. Required for Docking missions. Spend 1 Energy to dock. If this craft returns to Earth, return this card to hand.
DESCRIPTION: Docking mechanism extending from a spacecraft with alignment guides and soft-capture ring, technical illustration, clean lines
ImageDescription: Spacecraft docking adapter extending toward a port ring, alignment lasers visible, technical cutaway illustration, educational aerospace style, warm lighting

Name: Orbital Tug
Text: Enables docking. Spend 1 Energy when activating this craft in orbit to gain +1 Range. If this craft returns to Earth, return this card to hand.
DESCRIPTION: Small thruster pod attached to a satellite performing orbital adjustment, vector flames, technical cartoon style
ImageDescription: Compact orbital maneuvering unit firing small thrusters near a satellite, precise vectors visible, clean educational illustration, bright space backdrop

Name: Docking Opportunity
Text: This round, any craft with a Docking tag that reaches an On-Orbit Station gains +2 VP.
DESCRIPTION: Two spacecraft approaching each other for docking in orbit, tense but hopeful scene, cinematic cartoon style
ImageDescription: Two spacecraft carefully aligning for orbital docking, Earth in background, tense precise moment, stylized educational illustration, bright lighting

Name: Transfer Window Storm
Text: This round, Transfer Window cost is increased by +2 (max TW 5).
DESCRIPTION: Intense solar wind buffeting a spacecraft near Mars transfer orbit, dramatic orange and red, stylized illustration
ImageDescription: Solar wind and particle streams hitting spacecraft during interplanetary transfer, Mars in distance, dramatic warm-toned space illustration, educational style

Name: Launch Window
Text: This round, Transfer Window cost is reduced by 2 (min TW 0).
DESCRIPTION: Diagram of planetary alignment with orbits highlighted, optimistic bright colors, schematic yet cinematic
ImageDescription: Planetary alignment diagram showing Earth and Mars in favorable positions, orbital paths highlighted, bright optimistic educational poster style

Name: Expanded Operations
Text: This round, each player's hand limit is increased to 7.
Flavor: Extra capacity for a busy quarter.
DESCRIPTION: Busy mission control room with extra screens and staff, energetic bright illustration
ImageDescription: Bustling mission control room with many screens, operators working extra shifts, energetic bright educational illustration

Name: Solar Panel
Text: Generates 2 Energy at the start of each Action Phase while this craft is in space. If this craft enters atmosphere, discard this card.
DESCRIPTION: Fold-out solar panels on a compact spacecraft bus, bright blue cells catching sunlight, crisp educational space illustration
ImageDescription: Fold-out solar panel array on a compact spacecraft bus, bright blue photovoltaic panels reflecting sunlight, clear silhouette, educational space hardware illustration

Name: RTG
Text: Generates 3 Energy at the start of each Action Phase. Works in any location. This card's Mass counts toward launch Thrust checks.
Flavor: Steady power far from the Sun.
DESCRIPTION: Compact RTG power unit with radiator fins and rugged shielding, deep-space probe hardware, stylized technical illustration
ImageDescription: Compact radioisotope generator with radiator fins and rugged shielding mounted on a deep-space probe, educational aerospace illustration, readable silhouette

Name: Battery Pack
Text: Enters play with 4 stored Energy. Does not generate Energy. At the end of the round, you may store 1 surplus generated Energy on this card, up to 4.
Flavor: Charge it now, spend it later.
DESCRIPTION: Modular battery pack with visible cells and charge indicators, clean aerospace hardware illustration, friendly technical style
ImageDescription: Modular spacecraft battery pack with visible charge cells and indicator lights, educational aerospace hardware illustration, crisp and readable

Name: Flight Computer
Text: Spend 1 Energy when this craft launches, docks, or relaunches from a surface: this craft gets +1 Reliability for that check.
Flavor: A little more brain, a little less risk.
DESCRIPTION: Compact flight computer module with glowing guidance screen and circuit details, clean sci-fi aerospace illustration
ImageDescription: Compact spacecraft flight computer with glowing guidance display and circuit details, clean educational sci-fi aerospace illustration

Name: Sensor Array
Text: Spend 1 Energy to activate this card. Required for Tier 3 Scientific missions and any mission text that requires Sensors.
DESCRIPTION: Deployable spacecraft sensor boom with cameras and instruments, precise technical cartoon style, bright space backdrop
ImageDescription: Deployable spacecraft sensor array with cameras and instruments on articulated booms, clean educational technical illustration, bright space backdrop
